title: AICodeReviewOutput
description: Structured output schema for AI code review. Used with Gemini's responseJsonSchema to guarantee parseable responses.

summary.description: 2-3 sentence overview of the PR and review findings

findings.description: List of specific issues found in the code. Use line: 0 for file-level findings that do not map to a specific line.

file.description: File path relative to repo root

line.description: Line number where the issue starts. Use 0 for file-level findings.

end_line.description: Line number where the issue ends (for multi-line findings)

title.description: Short title for the finding (under 80 characters)

comment.description: Explanation of the issue and why it matters. Keep under 200 words.

suggestion.description: Concrete code fix or action to resolve the issue. Omit this field if no specific fix applies.

highlights.description: Things done well in this PR worth acknowledging. Omit or leave empty if nothing stands out.

missing_guardrails.description: Coding standards files that should exist but do not. Only populate when no rules files are found.

suggested_content.description: Starter content for the file, tailored to the detected tech stack
